content.title: Shaping tomorrow, today
content.description: In a world of constant change, innovation is a continuous strategy. We help organizations rewrite the rules of growth, innovation, and resilience.

1.title: Design and production of monitoring and automation systems
1.subTitle: Automation and monitoring systems enable continuous monitoring of processes and automated execution of tasks. These solutions increase the speed of work, reduce human errors, and help improve overall system performance.

2.title: Website and software design and production
2.subTitle: We turn your ideas into digital solutions. We offer practical solutions tailored to your business needs through website design and dedicated software. Our focus is on beauty, efficiency, and creating a professional presence in the digital world.

3.title: Network and system support
3.subTitle: Stable infrastructure is the beating heart of everyone and successful work. By providing specialized network services and support, we guarantee the security and stability of your systems. From start-up to maintenance and troubleshooting, we are with you so that you can focus on growing your business by reducing downtime.

4.title: Logo And Logo Motion
4.subTitle: Your brand identity starts with a professional logo. We give winners personality and longevity by designing creative logos and engaging motion logos.

description.line1: Software design is not just about coding,
description.line2: we are with the project at all stages

OurCustomersSection.badge: Partnering with Leading Organizations and Businesses

structuredExecution.title: Understanding and Reviewing Needs
structuredExecution.description: Every project starts with a clear understanding of the problem. Before taking any action, we look into your business needs, goals, and challenges to create a solution that fits your real situation. This step ensures the project gets off on the right track from the very beginning.

contractDrivenScope.title: Design and Implementation
contractDrivenScope.description: We transform ideas into practical solutions. Once the requirements are clearly defined, the design and development process begins. Throughout implementation, we carefully consider technical requirements, user experience, and long-term scalability to deliver not just a product, but a reliable and effective solution.

continuousResponsibility.title: Delivery, support, and improvement
continuousResponsibility.description: A project doesn't just end with delivery. After launch, we check how the system is performing, and make any needed tweaks and provide support. Our goal is to give you a solution that can grow along with your business.

TeamSection.title: The People Behind Exceptional Digital Products
TeamSection.description: Our team brings together expertise in software engineering, design, and AI to create scalable digital solutions.

hero.description: From idea to deployment — we design and develop software solutions tailored to your business needs.

web.title: Web Application Development
web.description: We build fast, scalable, and modern web applications from scratch — tailored to your business logic and goals.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: Native and cross-platform mobile apps that deliver smooth experiences on both iOS and Android.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.description: We integrate intelligent AI features into your existing software — chatbots, automation, data analysis and more.

consulting.title: Software Consulting
consulting.description: Not sure where to start? We help you plan, architect, and choose the right tech stack for your project.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We listen to your idea and understand your goals.

development.title: Development
development.description: Clean code, agile sprints and regular updates.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: Deploy, test and support after delivery.

readyToBuild.title: Ready to Build Something?
readyToBuild.description: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

HeroSection.description:
Ati Hoosh Bonyan is a team of IT professionals dedicated to delivering practical and reliable technology solutions for businesses. We specialize in technology infrastructure design and implementation, software and web development, network support, process automation, and artificial intelligence solutions.

We believe technology creates real value only when it solves real business challenges. That is why, in every project, we focus on delivering solutions that not only meet high technical standards but also improve efficiency, enhance productivity, and support sustainable business growth.

StorySection.title: Where did we start?
StorySection.description: Ati Housh started with a simple idea: creating digital products that are truly designed for people. We believe technology should serve humans.

founded.title: Company founded
founded.description: Started with 3 people and a small office

BannerSection.title: Making reinvention real for our clients
BannerSection.description: Reinvention Services brings together the full breadth of Accenture, enabling us to solve your most complex problems and deliver reinvention at greater scale and impact.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We're always looking for creative and different solutions

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.description: We consider the customer's success as our own success

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We never compromise on quality at any stage

LeadershipSection.title: A Word from the CEO
LeadershipSection.paragraph1: We believe that the gap between Iranian businesses and the world's leading brands is more about vision and intelligent use of technology than about capabilities.
LeadershipSection.paragraph2: Our goal is to provide a platform for Iranian companies to compete with global standards by applying innovative solutions in the fields of information technology, artificial intelligence, and digital marketing.
LeadershipSection.paragraph3: For us, each project is not just a service; it is a step on the path of growth, innovation, and sustainable value creation. The future belongs to organizations that embrace change, and we will be their companion and development partner on this path.
LeadershipSection.name: Nahid Shams

HeroSection.description: Have a question, a project in mind, or just want to get in touch? Send us a message and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

SendMessageForm.title: Get in touch
SendMessageForm.description: Fill out the form below and we'll respond within one business day.
SendMessageForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project or question...
SendMessageForm.privacy: We respect your privacy. Your details are never shared with third parties.

HeroSection.description: Articles on artificial intelligence, software engineering, and cybersecurity — for teams that build, not just talk.

GetNewArticle.title: Get new articles in your inbox
GetNewArticle.description: Practical insights on AI, software and security — no noise, just what's useful for your business.

HeroSection.description: We're a team of designers and developers who use AI to build better digital experiences. Send us your resume — we'd love to know what you're great at.

ApplyForm.title: Tell us about yourself
ApplyForm.description: Fill in your details and attach your resume. We typically respond within a few days.
ApplyForm.privacy: Your information is reviewed only by our HR team and is never shared with sales or third parties.
